description_long: This is a modern gas station complex featuring a large, flat, rectangular canopy with a blue trim and the Petron brand logo prominently displayed. The fueling area is covered by the canopy, supported by several sturdy columns, and includes multiple fuel pumps arranged in a row. Adjacent to the fueling area is a rectangular convenience store building with a flat roof, white exterior walls, and visible entry doors. The station is enclosed by a low black boundary, and there are landscaped green patches with signage, including a tall, branded sign near the entrance. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the fueling area, store, and signage, designed for easy vehicle access and visibility.
description: A modern Petron gas station with a large blue-trimmed canopy, multiple fuel pumps, a convenience store, and prominent signage within a spacious, enclosed lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Petron-branded canopy, three visible fuel pumps, and the main fueling area.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the convenience store building, back of the canopy, and boundary enclosure.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the rear of the convenience store and the full extent of the canopy structure.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the side of the convenience store, canopy supports, and the tall Petron sign near the entrance.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Three modern fuel pumps are visible under the canopy, arranged in a single row. They are primarily white with blue and red accents, matching the Petron branding, and each features hoses and nozzles. Digital displays are present on the pumps.
attribute_canopy_structure: A large, flat, rectangular canopy with blue trim and Petron branding covers the fueling area. It is supported by four robust columns and appears to be constructed from steel and concrete. The canopy includes integrated lighting and signage.
attribute_station_signage: The main Petron sign is a tall, rectangular pylon with the Petron logo and colors, located near the entrance. Additional signage is present on the canopy fascia, displaying the Petron name and logo. Smaller signs are visible near the boundary and landscaping.
attribute_price_display_board: A price display board is integrated into the tall Petron pylon sign near the entrance. It is rectangular, with digital or manual price listings, and is clearly visible from the road.
attribute_convenience_store_entrance: The convenience store entrance is located on the side of the building facing the fueling area. It features two manual glass doors with white frames, and there is no visible overhead signage above the entrance.
